sentence: go to saucedemo.com, log in with username standard_user and password secret_sauce, add the Sauce Labs Backpack and the Sauce Labs Bike Light to the cart, open the shopping cart, click checkout, enter first name Test, last name User, postal code 12345, continue, and then finish the order

sentence: go to the-internet.herokuapp.com/login, log in with username tomsmith and password SuperSecretPassword!, click Logout, then go to the-internet.herokuapp.com/dynamic_controls, click the Enable button, wait for the input field to become enabled, and type hello into it

workflow.name: Start Browser
workflow.description: Initial state to navigate to the login page.
triggers: If the current URL is chrome://new-tab-page/
If the current URL is about:blank
If the current URL starts with data:
If no page has been loaded yet

workflow.name: Login
workflow.description: Enter credentials and log in to the application.
triggers: If the current URL contains /login
If a text input with name 'username' is visible
actions: Type 'tomsmith' into the text input with name 'username'
Type 'SuperSecretPassword!' into the password input with name 'password'

workflow.name: Logout from Secure Area
workflow.description: Successfully logged in, now click the logout button.
triggers: If the current URL contains /secure
If a button with text 'Logout' is visible

workflow.name: Navigate to Dynamic Controls
workflow.description: After logging out, navigate to the dynamic controls page.
triggers: If the current URL contains /login
If a text input with name 'username' is visible

workflow.name: Enable Input Field
workflow.description: On the dynamic controls page, click the 'Enable' button.
triggers: If the current URL contains /dynamic_controls
If a button with text 'Enable' is visible

workflow.name: Waiting for Input Field to be Enabled
workflow.description: Wait for the input field to become enabled after clicking 'Enable'.
triggers: If the current URL contains /dynamic_controls
If a button with text 'Disable' is visible
If the text input with id 'text' is disabled

workflow.name: Type into Enabled Field
workflow.description: The input field is now enabled, type 'hello' into it.
triggers: If the current URL contains /dynamic_controls
If the text input with id 'text' is enabled
actions: Type 'hello' into the text input with id 'text'

workflow.name: Task Complete
workflow.description: All specified actions have been performed.
triggers: If the current URL contains /dynamic_controls
If the text input with id 'text' contains 'hello'

state_names: Waiting for Input Field to be Enabled
states_with_no_actions: Waiting for Input Field to be Enabled

lint_issues.state: Waiting for Input Field to be Enabled
lint_issues.message: Empty actions with a wait/verification-sounding name -- looks like an intentional 'sit here until something external changes' state. Confirm that's what you meant.

sentence: go to the-internet.herokuapp.com/login, log in with username tomsmith and password SuperSecretPassword!, click Logout, then go to the-internet.herokuapp.com/dynamic_controls, click the Enable button, wait for the input field to become enabled, and type hello into it

Type 'SuperSecretPassword!' into the input field with name 'password'

If a button with text 'Login' is visible

workflow.description: Identifies the dynamic controls page and clicks the 'Enable' button to activate the input field.

If a button with text 'Enable' is visible

workflow.name: Waiting for Input Field to Enable
workflow.description: Waits for the input field to become enabled after the 'Enable' button has been clicked.

If a button with text 'Disable' is visible
If the input field with id 'text' is disabled

workflow.name: Input Field Enabled, Type Text
workflow.description: Detects that the input field is now enabled and types 'hello' into it.

If a button with text 'Disable' is visible
If the input field with id 'text' is enabled
actions: Type 'hello' into the input field with id 'text'

workflow.name: Task Complete
workflow.description: Confirms that 'hello' has been successfully typed into the enabled input field and terminates the workflow.
triggers: If the current URL contains /dynamic_controls
If the input field with id 'text' contains 'hello'
actions: Terminate: Successfully typed 'hello' into the enabled field.
